title: SalC1's Mods
description: All the mods featured in SalC1's Video!
body:
**🚀 ITITAN Hosting - Premium, Reliable & Budget-Friendly Minecraft Servers - from just €2.50/month**

Enjoy 10% off your first month with the code **JSON10**!

# SalC1's Mods

This is a modpack featuring the mods showcased in SalC1's video.

# Why Download

These mods have been trusted and used by the large Minecraft content creator SalC1, who has relied on them for years, bringing you the best performance, reliability, and optimization.

# Mod List

- AppleSkin
- Fabric API
- BoatView360
- Bobby
- Controlling
- Fabrishot
- Fadeless
- Forge Config API Port
- Freecam
- In-Game Account Switcher
- JourneyMap
- Lighty
- Lithium
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
- Mod Menu
- No Chat Reports
- No Telemetry
- Pick Up Notifier
- Prism
- Puzzles Lib
- Text Placeholder API
- Searchables
- Shulker Box Tooltip
- Stendhal
- Reeses's Sodium Options
- ViaFabric Plus

**[Credit To SalC1's Youtube Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pTc09RtJRZY)**
